rulings.Case Title: SAMETC, LLC et al VS. TED AND PAULINE ELMS et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 13, 2020 line 1. PETITIONER SAMETC, LLC Notice Of Continued Hearing is GRANTED and remanded. The Court finds that the decision and the judgment thereon contained a temporary bar on ownership based on then-existing circumstances. The matter is remanded to the arbitrator to decide whether the same or other circumstances exist for the bar on ownership to be maintained or dissolved. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BIANA CHERNOGUZ ET AL VS. LEANA PEREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-20-666785 WITH CASE CGC-17-560648
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 13, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT LEANA PEREZ, FRANCISCO ARMAS MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-20-666785 WITH CASE CGC-17-560648 is GRANTED as follows: cases are consolidated for trial. While the moving party claims that "the two actions involve the same named parties," the review of the cases indicated that Vladislav Chernoguz is only a party to one of the actions. No further explanation, argument or evidence is provided. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BIANA CHERNOGUZ VS. LEANA PEREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 13, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT LEANA PEREZ, FRANCISCO ARMAS MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to paragraphs 42 and 45 of the First Amended Complaint. Claims asserted arise out of protected activity and Plaintiff presented no argument and no corresponding evidence regarding prevailing on the merits. Motion is otherwise denied, moving party failed to shift its burden on the first prong of anti-SLAPP. As drafted, claims do not arise out of protected activity as defined in CCP 425.16. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BIANA CHERNOGUZ VS. LEANA PEREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 13, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT LEANA PEREZ, FRANCISCO ARMAS DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is overruled, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. See paragraph 8 of Notice and paragraph 34 of FAC. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LOIS E. LOW VS. ROSA CANALES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial Date And For Order Sealing Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Tim Sasaki
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 13, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT ROSA CANALES, JESUS VALVERDE Defendants' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial Date And For Order Sealing Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Tim Sasaki is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to Continue trial is DENIED. Motion to Seal is granted as follows: moving party to prepare a redacted version of Points and Authorities and Declaration redacting all references to the matters subject to the motion and present it at the hearing. The Court notes that its e-filing records indicate that a Protective Order was rejected on August 25, 2020 and has not been re-submitted. =(501/CFH)
